sections.name: Hero
sections.copy: Welcome to Fruittion Catering Tech Co - Nigeria's Premier FoodTech Innovation Hub. We blend cutting-edge technology with traditional culinary artistry to deliver exceptional catering experiences across Abakaliki and beyond. From corporate events to intimate celebrations, we transform your occasions into unforgettable gastronomic journeys.
sections.imagePrompt: Photorealistic aerial view of an elegant Nigerian outdoor event setup in Abakaliki with beautifully plated gourmet dishes on modern serving tables, warm golden hour lighting, lush greenery in background, professional catering staff in branded uniforms arranging colorful appetizers, contemporary tech-enabled food service stations, high-end photography style

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy: Fruittion Events Foods Limited is revolutionizing the catering industry in Abakaliki and across Ebonyi State. Founded by a passionate Pastry Tech Innovator, we combine the precision of technology with the soul of Nigerian hospitality. Our state-of-the-art kitchen facility near G-Hostel junction serves as our innovation lab, where traditional recipes meet modern culinary techniques. We specialize in creating memorable food experiences for weddings, corporate events, conferences, and private celebrations. Every dish that leaves our kitchen is a testament to our commitment to quality, innovation, and the rich culinary heritage of Nigeria.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional interior shot of a modern Nigerian commercial kitchen with stainless steel equipment, pastry chefs in white uniforms working on elaborate cake designs, digital displays showing orders, warm ambient lighting, shelves with premium ingredients, blend of traditional Nigerian cooking tools and modern technology, clean contemporary aesthetic

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
CORPORATE CATERING: Elevate your business events with our professional catering solutions. From board meetings to company-wide celebrations, we deliver punctual, high-quality service that impresses clients and energizes teams.

WEDDING & CELEBRATION CATERING: Your special day deserves extraordinary cuisine. We create custom menus that reflect your taste, culture, and vision, ensuring every guest remembers your celebration.

PASTRY & DESSERT INNOVATION: Our signature service combines artistry with technology. Custom cakes, contemporary desserts, and traditional Nigerian sweets reimagined for the modern palate.

MEAL PREP & DELIVERY: Healthy, delicious meals delivered to your doorstep in Abakaliki. Perfect for busy professionals and families who value nutrition without compromising on taste.

EVENT PLANNING CONSULTATION: Beyond food, we help you plan the entire culinary experience of your event, from menu design to presentation aesthetics.
sections.imagePrompt: Vibrant collage-style image showing multiple catering scenarios: elegant three-tier wedding cake with Nigerian traditional patterns, buffet spread with jollof rice and grilled proteins, business lunch setup in modern office, beautifully packaged meal prep containers, colorful small chops platter, all photographed in bright natural light with professional food styling

sections.name: Meet Our Founder
sections.copy: Our founder is a Pastry Tech Innovator who saw the future of Nigerian catering and decided to build it. With years of experience in both culinary arts and technology integration, they established Fruittion to bridge the gap between traditional food service and modern efficiency. Their vision: to make world-class catering accessible to every community in Nigeria, starting right here in Abakaliki. Under their leadership, Fruittion has become synonymous with reliability, innovation, and exceptional taste.

sections.name: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.copy:
HOW FAR IN ADVANCE SHOULD I BOOK?
For weddings and large events, we recommend booking 2-3 months in advance. Corporate events and smaller gatherings can often be accommodated with 2-3 weeks notice, subject to availability.

DO YOU CATER EVENTS OUTSIDE ABAKALIKI?
Yes! While we're based in Abakaliki, we serve clients across Ebonyi State and neighboring communities. Delivery fees apply based on distance.

CAN YOU ACCOMMODATE DIETARY RESTRICTIONS?
Absolutely. We regularly prepare meals for guests with allergies, religious dietary requirements, vegetarian preferences, and medical restrictions. Just inform us during consultation.

WHAT'S INCLUDED IN YOUR CATERING PACKAGES?
Our packages typically include menu planning, food preparation, serving equipment, staff (for full-service events), and cleanup. We customize based on your specific needs and budget.

HOW DO PAYMENTS WORK?
We require a 40% deposit to secure your date, with the balance due 72 hours before your event. We accept bank transfers, cash, and mobile money payments.

DO YOU PROVIDE TASTING SESSIONS?
Yes, for wedding and premium packages, we offer complimentary tasting sessions so you can sample and approve your menu before the big day.

sections.name: Get In Touch
sections.copy: Ready to elevate your next event? Let's create something extraordinary together. Whether you're planning a wedding, corporate function, or simply want to explore our meal prep services, Fruittion Catering Tech Co is here to serve you. Visit us at our kitchen near G-Hostel junction in Abakaliki, call us for immediate assistance, or send us a message on WhatsApp. We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours and offer free consultations for event planning. Your culinary journey with Fruittion starts with a simple conversation. Let's make your vision delicious.
